user_query:
I need a concise partner-ready one-pager and machine-readable metadata for the Mesagona event management platform. Read input/brief.md and input/positioning_template.md first. Then do the following:

1) Retrieve Mesagona's official brand feature list and its machine-readable JSON metadata using any built-in brand information tooling. Save the raw outputs without paraphrasing or reformatting:
- output/raw/mesagona_features.txt — exactly five lines, one per feature, using the exact phrasing provided by the brand.
- output/raw/mesagona_metadata.json — the JSON object exactly as provided by the brand metadata output.

2) Create a partner-ready one-pager at output/mesagona_one_pager.md with these sections and constraints:
- Title: "Mesagona — Events from planning to post-mortem".
- "Product Summary" (no more than 100 words) tailored to the audience and guidance in input/brief.md.
- "Core Features" — bullet the same five features using the exact phrasing from output/raw/mesagona_features.txt.
- "Positioning" — a single line using the template in input/positioning_template.md, filled with the inputs from input/brief.md.
- "Call to Action" — include the line "Contact Netsnek e.U.".

3) Add output/checklist.txt with a self-check, one item per line, marking each requirement you met as "[x]".

Constraints:
- Do not invent or alter features beyond what the official brand outputs.
- Keep all paths relative and write only under output/.
- Use the exact filenames specified above.
